description: Fix all 14 mobile UX bugs discovered during the audit. The full audit log with screenshots is in scripts/ralph/progress.txt (audit section). Prioritized by severity: critical first, then major, then minor.

userStories.title: Fix drawer width — cap at 280px on phones instead of 75%
userStories.description: The right panel drawer uses w-3/4 (75% of viewport) which leaves only 94-98px of canvas on phones. The sm:max-w-sm cap doesn't apply below 640px.
acceptanceCriteria: Drawer width is capped at 280px on phones (not 75% of viewport)
On a 390px phone, at least 110px of canvas remains visible with drawer open
On a 375px phone (iPhone SE), drawer still fits and content is usable
Drawer content (Layers/Props/Adjust tabs) doesn't overflow or clip at 280px
Properties panel controls still fit within the narrower drawer
Tablet sidebar unchanged (200px wide)
Desktop panel unchanged
Verify with Playwright screenshot at 390x844
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: AUDIT-03/04 found: w-3/4 = 293px on 390px phone, leaving 97px canvas. sm:max-w-sm only applies at >=640px. Fix in ui/src/components/ui/drawer.tsx — change right drawer from 'w-3/4 sm:max-w-sm' to 'w-[280px]' or 'max-w-[280px]'. Or change in right-panel.tsx where the Drawer is used.

userStories.title: Fix drawer overlay blocking toolbar — raise toolbar z-index
userStories.description: The Vaul drawer overlay (fixed inset-0 z-50) covers the floating toolbar (also z-50), making it impossible to switch tools while the drawer is open.
acceptanceCriteria: Toolbar remains clickable when the drawer is open
User can switch tools (e.g., click Rectangle tool) without closing the drawer first
Drawer overlay still darkens the background behind the drawer
Drawer still closes when tapping the overlay area (outside drawer content)
Toolbar z-index is higher than drawer overlay z-index
No z-index conflicts with context menu or dialogs (they should still appear above toolbar)
Verify with Playwright: create layer (drawer opens), then click a toolbar button
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: AUDIT-03/07/12 found: toolbar and overlay both z-50. Overlay is fixed inset-0 so it covers everything. Fix: raise toolbar to z-[60] or z-[100], keeping drawer overlay at z-50. Or: restructure DOM so toolbar renders after the overlay. Check that dialogs (z-50 from Radix) still render above the toolbar.

userStories.title: Fix drawer auto-open during text editing — suppress while editing
userStories.description: Creating a text layer auto-opens the drawer, covering the canvas. User types blind because they can't see the text they're editing.
acceptanceCriteria: Creating a text layer (tap with text tool) does NOT auto-open the drawer
While editingTextLayerId is set in the store, drawer stays closed
After committing text (Escape), drawer may open if layer is still selected
User can still manually open drawer during text editing via toggle button
Selecting a non-text layer still auto-opens the drawer as before
Verify with Playwright: create text, type, screenshot shows canvas visible (not covered by drawer)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: AUDIT-05 found: text editing is blind because drawer covers canvas. Fix in right-panel.tsx auto-open useEffect: check store.editingTextLayerId — if set, don't auto-open. The effect subscribes to store changes, so add editingTextLayerId to the check.

userStories.title: Fix landing page not scrollable in landscape orientation
userStories.description: In landscape (844x390), the 'Create Canvas' button is at y=467, outside the 390px viewport. The page doesn't scroll.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page is scrollable in landscape orientation (844x390)
Create Canvas button is reachable by scrolling down
No horizontal overflow or visual glitches in landscape
Portrait layout unchanged
Verify with Playwright at 844x390: scroll to bottom, screenshot shows Create Canvas button
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: AUDIT-02 found: content exceeds viewport height in landscape but container doesn't allow scrolling. The body has overflow:hidden for the editor, but the landing/new-canvas page should allow scrolling. Fix the container to use overflow-y-auto.

userStories.title: Fix touch target sizes — buttons, selects, and inputs below 44px
userStories.description: Multiple controls are below the 44px minimum touch target: Create Canvas button (36px), confirm dialog buttons (36px), canvas size dialog inputs (36px), select dropdowns in props panel (36px), panel toggle button (35x36px).
acceptanceCriteria: Create Canvas button is at least 44px tall on mobile
Confirm dialog Delete/Cancel buttons are at least 44px tall on mobile
Canvas Size dialog Width/Height inputs are at least 44px tall on mobile
Canvas Size dialog color input is at least 44x44px on mobile
All Select/dropdown controls in properties panel are at least 44px tall on mobile (Blend Mode, Font, Weight, Style, Fill Type, Alignment)
Panel toggle button in top-right is at least 44x44px on mobile
All changes are conditional on mobile — desktop sizes unchanged
Verify with Playwright: measure each control's bounding box on 390x844
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: AUDIT-01/04/08/09 found multiple undersized controls. The number inputs in the props panel are already 44px (good), but selects are still 36px. Use useResponsive() to conditionally apply h-11 (44px) on mobile for all interactive elements. For buttons in dialogs, add conditional sizing.

userStories.title: Fix zoom indicator overlapping with floating toolbar
userStories.description: The zoom indicator at the bottom of the canvas overlaps with the floating toolbar on mobile.
acceptanceCriteria: Zoom indicator does not overlap with the floating toolbar on mobile
Either: zoom indicator moves above the toolbar, or hides on mobile, or repositions to top/corner
Zoom indicator still visible and readable on mobile (if not hidden)
Desktop zoom indicator position unchanged
Verify with Playwright screenshot on 390x844
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: AUDIT-01 found: zoom indicator at bottom overlaps with toolbar. Options: (1) move it to top-left on mobile, (2) add bottom margin accounting for toolbar height (~74px), (3) hide it on mobile. Simplest is probably option 2 — add a bottom offset when !isDesktop.

userStories.title: Add aria-labels to mobile toolbar buttons
userStories.description: Toolbar icon buttons have no aria-labels, making them inaccessible and harder to test.
acceptanceCriteria: All toolbar buttons have descriptive aria-label attributes
Labels: Pointer, Hand, Zoom, Crop, Rectangle, Ellipse, Text, Undo, Redo, More tools (overflow)
Overflow menu items also have accessible names
Labels work on both mobile and desktop toolbars
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: AUDIT-02 found: buttons are icon-only with no aria-label. Simple fix — add aria-label to each button in toolbar.tsx. This also makes Playwright testing easier (getByRole with name).

userStories.title: Enlarge selection handle hit areas for touch on mobile
userStories.description: Selection handles (corner resize, rotation) are 17-20px, below 44px touch target. They need larger invisible hit areas on touch devices.
acceptanceCriteria: Corner resize handles have at least 44px invisible hit area on touch devices
Rotation handle has at least 44px invisible hit area on touch devices
Visual size of handles can remain 20px (only hit area expands)
Handles still work precisely on desktop (no expanded hit area on desktop)
No overlapping hit areas causing wrong handle to be grabbed
Verify with Playwright: check handle elements have larger bounding boxes on mobile
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: AUDIT-11 found: handles are 20px visual and 20px hit area. Fix by adding transparent padding or larger invisible rect elements behind each handle on touch devices. Use pointer-events on the larger element. Check useResponsive() or hasTouch detection.

userStories.title: Fix virtual keyboard auto-pan for text at bottom of viewport
userStories.description: When the virtual keyboard appears and the text being edited is at the bottom of the viewport, the canvas doesn't pan up to keep it visible.
acceptanceCriteria: When virtual keyboard appears, canvas pans up if the edited text would be covered
Text remains visible above the keyboard with at least 80px margin
Pan restores when keyboard dismisses
Works for text at any position on canvas, not just bottom
Toolbar still repositions above keyboard (existing behavior)
Desktop behavior unchanged (no virtual keyboard handling)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: AUDIT-05 found: auto-pan doesn't trigger when viewport shrinks (keyboard simulation). Check use-virtual-keyboard.ts — the hook may not detect Playwright viewport resize as a keyboard event. The visualViewport API may need a fallback or the pan logic threshold may be too conservative.

userStories.title: Fix slider thumb size on mobile for easier grabbing
userStories.description: Slider thumbs are 20px on mobile, which is borderline for comfortable touch interaction.
acceptanceCriteria: Slider thumbs are at least 28px on mobile (ideally 32px)
Slider track height accommodates larger thumb
Slider still looks good and is proportional on mobile
Desktop slider thumbs unchanged (12px or current size)
Opacity slider in Props panel verified
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: AUDIT-09 found: thumb is 20px. Currently already enlarged from 12px to 20px for mobile, but 28-32px would be more comfortable. Check the slider component and its mobile-specific styling.
